title: Sebaceous cyst - Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia
content: Link: Sebaceous cyst - Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia A sebaceous cyst (a form of trichilemmal cyst) is a closed sac or cyst below the surface of the skin that has a lining that resembles the uppermost part (infundibulum) of a hair follicle and fills with a fatty white, semi-solid material called sebum. Sebum is produced by sebaceous glands of the epidermis.
